title: CircuitClash
subtitle: An informative and competitive initiative aimed at introducing students to PCB design fundamentals. The event combined learning with practical exposure, fostering interest and engagement in electrical engineering concepts.
description:
Title of the Event: CircuitClash 
 Objective of the Event: To promote awareness, build foundational understanding, and provide a competitive platform for students in the field of PCB Design through the CircuitClash initiative. 
 Benefits in terms of learning, skills, and knowledge gained: CircuitClash offered a structured and comprehensive learning experience that strengthened students engagement with electrical engineering concepts. The online seminar served as an accessible entry point for beginner.
location: Bharati Vidyapeeth's College of Engineering, New Delhi
